items.title: Nico Collins staying in Houston
items.summary: The Houston Texans have shut down any speculation surrounding wide receiver Nico Collins, making it clear they have no intention of moving one of their top offensive weapons.  General manager Nick Caserio delivered a blunt and definitive message following Day 2 of the NFL Draft.  “We’re not trading Nico Collins,” Caserio said.

items.title: Sauce Gardner: I’m Colts’ first-round pick (next year, too)
items.summary: INDIANAPOLIS – Sauce Gardner isn’t buying into the notion that the Indianapolis Colts don’t have a pick in the first round of Thursday night’s NFL Draft. “I’m the first-round pick,’’ he said this week with a smile. Actually, more than that. “I’m the first-round pick two times,’’ Gardner said. This year, and in 2027. That [...]

items.title: Colts bring back 'Schedule Challenge' contest
items.summary: INDIANAPOLIS -- You can take your best guess at predicting the Indianapolis Colts' 2026 schedule for a chance to win tickets to the Super Bowl. items.title: Colts announce '2026 Schedule Challenge'
items.summary: The Indianapolis Colts today announced the “2026 Schedule Challenge,” where one contestant can win two tickets to Super Bowl LXI by most accurately predicting the Colts’ entire 18-week schedule for the 2026 regular season.
